name: ai-phill
description: Strategic advisor for founders. Facilitates deep thinking through Socratic dialogue, identifies blind spots, assesses risks and opportunities, and provides guidance on strategic decisions using Extended Thinking for complex analysis.
capabilities: Guides strategic decisions through Socratic questioning
Identifies cognitive biases and blind spots
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: This is a pure prompt-based skill containing only documentation and conversation templates. There is NO executable code, no file system access, no network operations, and no code execution capabilities. All 46 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES caused by the analyzer misidentifying documentation text as code patterns. The backticks are for markdown code formatting, not shell execution. The URLs are source references, not network targets. No security risk present.
valueStatement: Founders face complex decisions without unbiased guidance. AI Phill facilitates deep thinking through Socratic dialogue to identify blind spots and assess strategic options objectively.
userTitle: Get strategic advice through Socratic questioning
limitations: Advisory only - cannot make decisions for you
Requires active participation and honest answers
May need multiple sessions for complex decisions
Cannot access real-time market or competitor data

useCases.title: Series A vs Bootstrap Decision
useCases.description: Explore funding options through structured questioning about vision, trade-offs, and personal alignment

useCases.title: Product Pivot Assessment
useCases.description: Test assumptions and explore alternatives before making major strategic changes

useCases.title: Hiring Strategy Evaluation
useCases.description: Analyze whether to hire senior roles or explore alternative solutions first

promptTemplates.title: Explore Decision
promptTemplates.scenario: When facing any major strategic choice
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me think through [decision]. I'm considering [option A] vs [option B]. What questions should I ask myself?

promptTemplates.title: Test Assumption
promptTemplates.scenario: When you have a core belief about your business
promptTemplates.prompt: I assume that [assumption]. What evidence supports this? What if I'm wrong?

promptTemplates.title: Scenario Analysis
promptTemplates.scenario: Before committing to a major initiative
promptTemplates.prompt: Model the scenarios for [decision] over [timeframe]. What are best/worst/most likely outcomes?

promptTemplates.title: Values Alignment
promptTemplates.scenario: When personal values conflict with business decisions
promptTemplates.prompt: Does [decision] align with my core values of [value 1] and [value 2]? What trade-offs am I making?

bestPractices: Be honest about your assumptions and biases - AI Phill cannot help if you hold back
Allow time for reflection between sessions - major decisions benefit from multiple conversations
Document your reasoning - helps track decision quality over time
antiPatterns: Asking for quick answers - AI Phill asks questions, does not provide them
Seeking validation for decisions already made - use it to test thinking instead
Using it as replacement for customer research or market validation

faq.question: Is AI Phill compatible with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, AI Phill works with Claude Code and Claude. It uses natural language conversation to guide strategic thinking.

faq.question: What are the daily usage limits?
faq.answer: No hard limits, but complex strategic analysis may use 10,000+ tokens per session. Plan accordingly for your API budget.

faq.question: Can I integrate this with my existing advisor network?
faq.answer: AI Phill complements human advisors by helping you prepare better questions and think through options before consulting them.

faq.question: How does AI Phill handle confidential business information?
faq.answer: AI Phill only uses information you provide in the current conversation. It does not store or remember past discussions.

faq.question: What if I disagree with AI Phill perspective?
faq.answer: That is expected and healthy. AI Phill acknowledges you have better information about your business and defers to your judgment.

faq.question: How does this compare to other AI business advisors?
faq.answer: AI Phill focuses on asking questions rather than giving answers, helping you develop your own strategic thinking capabilities.
